                          RAP RAP RAP KAT ALP CHL ALP RAP JAX ALP BAR ALP EMB KAT JAX EMB EMB EMB EMB PEN EMB ALP EMB RAP RAP EMB YIX EMB ALP YIX YIX VIB PEN YIX PEN ALP GOR RAP STA YIX XOX XOX YIX SKY GOR STA GOR WUL GOR WIN SLO SLO HEW ALP XOX HEW HEW JAX HEW WHO REN HEW EGO SLO GOR SLO SLO TIT TIT GOR YIX TIT LAV ALP WHO DEE SWI SWI HEW ONI SWI GOR SWI ONI TIT GOF SWI CAR CAR ONI ARB HEW GOR YIX DEE CAR WIN PEN GOR TIT GOR HEW SWI EMB EGO SWI PEL WHO GOR HFM SWI EGO PEL CAR MIN ONI SQU GMO PEL SQU PEL  XL SWI CHI XOX KAN SWI GOR SLO EGO PEL KAN SLO ANG SWI XOX KAN CHI HIG SLO GOR HFM ZET CAR SWI HEW KAN GMO ZET OLE GMO EUL AMO AMO REN ANG ZET PEC HFM ZET JUD SPA KAN XOX HEW MON ALP FIG SPA SWI QME HEW DDQ PUR DJA LIC QME PUR PIS QME TRU NOE PUS GMO QME IMR NAB PUR PUR FAS PIS PIS PIS ZHO PIS DJA DDQ IMR LEO BRU
